ZACC 24; Ontario Human Rights Commission v. Simpsons – Sears 
“Ontario HRC”, MANU/SCCN/0009/1985; Orsus v. Croatia [2010] 
ECHR 337; Abdulaziz, Cabales and Balkandali v. United Kingdom 
[1985] ECHR 7; National Capital Alliance on Race Relations v. 
Canada (Health and Welfare), 1997 28 C.H.R.R.D / 179 (Canadian 
Human Rights Tribunal); Van Raalte v. The Netherlands [1997] 
ECHR 6; Action Travail des Femmes v. Canadian National Railway 
Company [1987] 1 SCR 1114 – referred to.
Books and Periodicals Cited
William N. Eskridge Jr and John A. Ferejohn, super-statutes, 50

Equality Revisited” Vol.14(3)., International journal of constitutional
